summary: Session Persistence & Push Notifications Testing - Iteration 175. Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED. Frontend: Login page loads correctly, authentication successful, redirects to home/app.
critical_code_review_comments: Session persistence: POST /api/auth/login correctly sets imos_session cookie with secure=True
Session restore: GET /api/auth/me correctly restores session from imos_session cookie
Push notifications: GET /api/push/vapid-key returns VAPID public key from env
Push subscribe: POST /api/push/subscribe/{userId} stores subscription in push_subscriptions collection
Push test: POST /api/push/test/{userId} attempts to send test notification (returns status=sent or status=no_subscriptions)
Engagement signals push integration: record_signal function fires async push notification task
Frontend api.ts has withCredentials:true for cookie handling and 401 auto-restore interceptor
Frontend index.tsx calls registerPushOnce after successful auth

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Login page loads, login successful, app loads after auth

seed_data_creation: Created test push subscriptions during testing (auto-cleaned via unsubscribe test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session persistence and push notifications fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/auth/login (sets imos_session cookie), GET /api/auth/me (restores from cookie), GET /api/push/vapid-key, POST /api/push/subscribe/{userId}, DELETE /api/push/unsubscribe/{userId}, POST /api/push/test/{userId}. Frontend loads correctly, login works, and redirects to authenticated area.

session_persistence.POST /api/auth/login sets imos_session c: PASS - Cookie set with secure=True, httponly=True, samesite=lax, path=/
session_persistence.GET /api/auth/me restores session from c: PASS - Returns user + token when valid cookie present

push_notifications.POST /api/push/test/{userId}: PASS - Returns status sent or no_subscriptions

regression_tests.GET /api/tasks/{userId}/performance: PASS - Returns performance data with communication stats

frontend_pages./home: PASS - App loads after login with dashboard data

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending goes through native SMS app
mocked_apis.Push notifications: Test subscriptions used (no real push service configured)
